name="descTipoParte" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="salaHorario"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="diaSemama" type="tns:diaSemanaEnum" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="horaFinal" type="xs:dateTime" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="horaInicial" type="xs:dateTime" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="competencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="descricao" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="classeJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codigo" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="descricao" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="recursal" type="xs:boolean" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="exigePoloPassivo" type="xs:boolean" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="tipoPartePoloPassivo" type="tns:tipoParte" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="tipoPartePoloAtivo" type="tns:tipoParte" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="orgaoJulgadorColegiado"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="descricao" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposAudiencia"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="jurisdicao"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="descricao" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTodosTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="return" type="tns:tipoDocumentoProcessual" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoDocumentoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codigo" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="descricao" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="papel"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="identificador" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="nome" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="recuperarInformacoesFluxoResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="return" type="tns:fluxo" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="fluxo"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codClasseJudicial" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="xml" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="return" type="tns:orgaoJulgador" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="orgaoJulgador"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="descricao" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="cargosJudiciais" type="tns:cargoJudicial" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="cargoJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="descricao" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarPrioridadeProcesso"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarClassesJudiciaisResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="return" type="tns:classeJudicial" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarJurisdicoesResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="return" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="ignoraFeriado" type="xs:boolean" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="nome" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="orgaoJulgador" type="tns:tipoAudiencia" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="tipoSala" type="tns:salaEnum" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoAudiencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="descricao" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="assuntoJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codigo" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="descricao"
